assertionResults.reason: At mobile viewport 390x844, bottom navigation is visible, sidebar overlay opens from the mobile control, and content/browse mobile state toggling is evidenced across captured states.
On /chat, existing conversations loaded, a new conversation was created, a message was sent, and an AI response rendered in the conversation pane with no JS errors.
Starting at /, navigation links successfully reached Queue, Highlights, Chat, and returned to Workspace; all routes rendered normally with no JS errors.

After clearing site data, first-visit navigation to / showed a meaningful shell (nav/aside/main present), first-contentful-paint recorded at 1176ms, body/heading fonts resolved to Manrope/Fraunces, and no chunk-load/JS errors were captured.
Workspace state persisted across route transitions: selected channel, video, content mode, and filters in URL params were unchanged before and after navigating away to Queue and back.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request log returned 'No requests captured' despite active API traffic.
frictions.resolution: Used Performance Resource Timing via browser evaluate as fallback network evidence (VAL-CHAT-001-network-perf.json).

frictions.description: In mobile sidebar overlay, direct clicks on some close/collapse refs were intermittently reported as blocked due overlapping interactive layers.
frictions.resolution: Used alternate interaction (Escape) and captured separate mobile state screenshots for bottom nav, overlay-open, and toggled content state.
